name: Orbit
description: Faint orbital rings, each carrying a small bright moon — reseeding sends every moon gliding to a new station along its path.

code.style: --moon: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( /* the angle and radius are emitted per cell and shared via @var, so the moon stays on its ring */ --ang: @r(0, 6.2832); --orb: @r(46, 84); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: calc(@var(--orb) * 1%); left: 50%; top: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); border: calc(14px / @Y) solid var(--color1); border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0.5; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 11%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--moon); left: calc(50% + cos(@var(--ang) * 1rad) * @var(--orb) * 0.5% - 5.5%); top: calc(50% + sin(@var(--ang) * 1rad) * @var(--orb) * 0.5% - 5.5%); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
